title: BTRFS qgroup deletion when deleting subvolume should be handled by kernel.
body:
/kind bug

Description

While deleting a subvolume on btrfs with qgroup enabled, current behavior is deleting qgroup explicitly before deleting the subvolume.
However, from arch's document.

> Note
Qgroups corresponding to subvolumes cannot be deleted directly, but should be automatically deleted by directly deleting the subvolume.

Also, in `btrfs-progs`, deleting a subvolume doesn't delete the qgroup.

[arch doc](https://wiki.archlinux.org/title/Btrfs)
